user.title: Configure Selora AI
user.description: Choose which LLM backend to use for automation suggestions.

selora_cloud.title: Selora AI Cloud
selora_cloud.description: Selora AI Cloud uses your Selora account — no API key needed. After setup, open the Selora AI panel and click "Link Selora account" to authenticate.

anthropic.title: Anthropic (Claude) Configuration
anthropic.description: Enter your Anthropic API key. Get one at console.anthropic.com.

gemini.title: Google Gemini Configuration
gemini.description: Enter your Google Gemini API key. Get one at aistudio.google.com.

openai.title: OpenAI Configuration
openai.description: Enter your OpenAI API key. Get one at platform.openai.com.

openrouter.title: OpenRouter Configuration
openrouter.description: Enter your OpenRouter API key. Get one at openrouter.ai/keys. Use vendor-prefixed model names like 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5'.

ollama.title: Ollama (Local) Configuration
ollama.description: Enter your local Ollama server details. Make sure the model is pulled.

selora_local.title: Selora AI Local Configuration
selora_local.description: Selora Hubs come pre-configured. To use a self-hosted llama-server running the Selora AI model, enter its address below.

select_devices.title: Select Devices to Onboard
select_devices.description:
Selora AI found {count} devices on your network. Assign a room to add a device, or select 'Skip' to skip it.

{device_list}

results.title: Device Setup Results
results.description:
Setup complete: {succeeded} succeeded, {failed} failed, {needs_attention} need manual attention.

{details}

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your API key, or verify Ollama is running and the model is pulled.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid Selora Connect credentials. Please check your email and password.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Selora AI cloud service. Please try again later.
abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during setup.
abort.llm_not_ready: Selora AI LLM backend is not running. Please configure it first.
abort.no_devices_found: No new devices were discovered on your network. Try again later.
abort.select_devices_failed: Device onboarding hit an unexpected error. Selora AI was set up without device onboarding — you can try again later from Settings > Devices > Add Entry. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

common.feedback_privacy_notice: Feedback is anonymous and contains no personal data.
common.feedback_textarea_placeholder: What's on your mind? (10 characters minimum)
common.feedback_email_placeholder: your@email.com — only if you’d like a reply
common.feedback_error: Couldn’t send feedback — please try again.
common.new_automation_subtitle: Describe what you want to automate — mention the devices, times, or conditions involved.
common.get_started_body: Configure your LLM provider in the Settings tab to start chatting with your home.
common.composer_placeholder_automation: Describe the automation you’d like to create…
common.panel_llm_invalid_key: Invalid API key or provider unreachable.
common.panel_linking_timed_out: Linking timed out. Please try again — make sure you finish signing in within 10 minutes.
common.panel_unlink_connect_confirm:
Unlink Selora Connect?

External MCP tools (Openclaw, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf) will lose access until you re-link.
common.panel_unlink_cloud_confirm:
Unlink Selora Cloud?

Chat and automation suggestions will stop until you re-link your account in Settings.
common.chat_welcome_suggestion_lights_label: Turn off all lights at midnight
common.chat_welcome_suggestion_lights_value: Create an automation that turns off all lights at midnight
common.chat_welcome_suggestion_devices_value: What devices do I have and which ones are currently on?
common.chat_welcome_suggestion_suggest_value: Suggest useful automations based on my devices and usage patterns
common.settings_doc_banner_desc: Learn how to set up LLM providers, remote access, and MCP tokens.
common.settings_selora_cloud_backend_desc: Selora Cloud is providing your LLM backend.
common.settings_signin_selora_desc: Sign in with your Selora account to use the hosted LLM backend. No API key required.
common.settings_selora_cloud_url_hint: OAuth and chat completions both use this URL. Saved automatically when you link.
common.settings_signin_new_tab_hint: Opens in a new tab. After signing in, return to this page — the panel updates automatically.
common.settings_selora_local_desc: Selora AI picks the right specialist model (commands, automations, answers, clarifications) per request automatically.
common.settings_selora_local_advanced_desc: Selora Hubs come pre-configured. To use a self-hosted llama-server running the Selora AI model, enter its address below.
common.settings_mcp_server_subtitle: Expose your home to external AI tools like Openclaw, Claude Desktop, Cursor, or Windsurf.
common.settings_connect_via_selora_desc: Makes your MCP server reachable by external tools
common.settings_mcp_tokens_desc: MCP tokens are an alternative to Selora Connect. Use them for tools that don't support OAuth or when you prefer token-based authentication.
common.settings_data_collector_desc: Feeds entity history to Selora AI
common.settings_network_discovery_desc: Scans local network for new devices
common.settings_pattern_detection_desc: Detects recurring usage patterns and proposes automations
common.settings_developer_mode_desc: Exposes raw entity payloads and debug logs
common.settings_telemetry_desc: Off by default. When on, sends anonymous counts about your setup (devices, integrations, automations, scenes, scripts, blueprints, areas) and how often Selora repairs model output, so we can improve the product. Never sends entity names, prompts, or responses.
common.telemetry_consent_body: Share anonymous counts about your setup (devices, integrations, automations…) and how often Selora repairs model output. Never your entity names, prompts, or responses.
common.settings_no_approvals_yet_prefix: No saved approvals yet. The next time Selora asks before running something risky, click
common.settings_wildcard_approval_title: Wildcard — applies to every entity of this service
common.settings_token_created_desc: Copy this token now — it won't be shown again.
common.automations_proposal_declined_body: Dismissed. You can refine it by replying below.
common.automations_proposal_yaml_edits_note: Your YAML edits will be used when you accept.
common.automations_action_run_tooltip: Trigger the actions now to verify they work
common.automations_action_open_in_ha_tooltip: Open this automation in Home Assistant
common.automations_elevated_risk_note: Uses elevated-risk actions — review the flow and YAML before enabling.
common.automations_toast_toggle_unresolved: Unable to toggle: automation id was not resolved. Reload and try again.
common.automations_unavailable_modal_intro: is marked as unavailable by Home Assistant. This usually means:
common.automations_unavailable_reason_entity: A trigger or condition references an entity that no longer exists
common.automations_unavailable_reason_yaml: The automation YAML has a configuration error
common.automations_unavailable_reason_integrati: A required integration was removed or is not loaded
common.automations_unavailable_modal_advice: Open the automation in Home Assistant Settings to review and fix the configuration.
common.scenes_card_declined_message: Dismissed. You can refine it by replying below.
common.scenes_no_entity_details: No entity details available — open the scene in Home Assistant to inspect it.
common.scenes_yaml_unavailable_comment: # YAML not available — open the scene in Home Assistant to view it.
common.scenes_empty_state: No scenes found. Ask Selora to create one.
common.scenes_delete_modal_suffix: ? This removes the scene from Home Assistant and cannot be undone.
common.usage_pricing_selora_cloud_help: Token and call counts are tracked locally in this integration's sensors and charts. Selora Cloud is billed in prepaid credits in your Selora Homes account, so no per-token cost estimate is shown here.
common.usage_pricing_view_cloud_link: View usage in your Selora Homes account
common.usage_pricing_ollama_help: Ollama runs locally — no token costs to track.
common.usage_pricing_selora_local_help: Selora AI Local runs on your hardware — no token costs to track.
common.usage_pricing_no_model_help: Configure an LLM provider and model in Settings to set custom pricing.
common.usage_pricing_intro_prefix: Cost estimates use these per-million-token rates. Anthropic defaults come from the
common.usage_pricing_intro_suffix: ; override here if you have negotiated rates or are tracking a different model.
common.usage_snippet_help: The visual card picker will also find these sensors after the Recorder's first hourly compilation.
common.usage_empty_body: Usage will appear after the first LLM call. Try chatting with Selora AI or running a suggestion cycle. If you've already used Selora AI and still see this, restart Home Assistant so the new sensors get registered.
common.usage_period_note_filtered: Period buckets come from the integration's usage store (kept for 30 days).
common.usage_period_note_unfiltered: Period buckets come from Home Assistant's long-term statistics, which compile hourly. New activity may take up to an hour to appear here.
common.usage_dashboard_sensors_help_prefix: Restart Home Assistant to register the usage sensors. Once registered, you can add them to any dashboard with a
common.usage_add_to_dashboard_help: Each metric has a different scale — create one card per sensor. Pick a metric, copy the YAML, then paste it in a dashboard's YAML editor.
common.suggestions_section_subtitle: Based on observed patterns and AI analysis in your home.
common.suggestions_empty_state: No suggestions yet. Tap "Generate" to analyze your home.
common.ignore_list_search_placeholder: Search an entity, device, or area…
common.approval_risk_explainer_low: Low risk: minor or fully reversible impact (sound, notifications, vacuum start/stop).
common.approval_risk_explainer_medium: Medium risk: noticeable side effects you may not want to undo (arming the alarm, locking a door, running a user script).
common.approval_risk_explainer_high: High risk: physical access, security, or host-level impact (unlocking a door, disarming the alarm, running shell commands).
common.approval_scope_button_title: Click to switch between scoping the grant to just this entity, or to all entities of this service.
common.quick_actions_approve_session_desc: Allow for the rest of this conversation
common.automation_management_cannot_refine_no_i: This automation cannot be refined because it has no automation ID.
common.chat_actions_interrupt_disconnect: Connection to Home Assistant was lost mid-response.
common.chat_actions_interrupt_server_no_reply: The server didn't reply in time.
common.chat_actions_interrupt_truncated: Response looks cut short — try again.
common.automation_crud_entity_not_surfaced: Automation saved, but Home Assistant hasn't surfaced the entity yet — toggle it on from the Automations tab once it appears.
common.automation_crud_auto_enable_failed_prefi: Automation saved but couldn't be enabled automatically:
common.automation_crud_auto_enable_failed_suffi: . Use the Enable button on the card to try again.
common.automation_crud_save_edited_yaml_failed: Failed to save automation from edited YAML:
common.session_toast_new_automation_chat_failed: Failed to start a new automation chat:
common.session_toast_ai_no_suggestion: AI didn't return a suggestion — try again.
common.session_toast_suggest_failed: Failed to generate a suggestion — check LLM config.
common.suggestions_analysis_no_new: Analysis complete — no new suggestions at this time

init.title: Background Services Settings
init.description: Configure background services for Selora AI.
